meaning: n.鍒嗘暎,鍦版柟鍒嗘潈,鎺掗櫎闆嗕腑
examples: Decentralization and experimentation must be encouraged.
He seems set against the idea of increased decentralization and greater powers for regional authorities.
Allison's philosophy of decentralization, he says, is an application of Rand's objectivist principles championing individualism--but with accountability.
The pair credit their success to an odd kind of decentralization: two chief executives and two headquarters.
